title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Zydus Lifesciences

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Zydus Lifesciences
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
